parameters.jsCode:
const forms = $json.ticket_forms || [];
return forms.map(f => ({ json: { form_id: f.id ?? null, form_name: f.name ?? null } }));

const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { rows_json: JSON.stringify(rows), row_count: rows.length } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO zendesk_ticket_forms_staging (form_id, form_name)
SELECT x.form_id, x.form_name
FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ $json.rows_json }}'::jsonb) AS x(
  form_id bigint,
  form_name text
)
ON CONFLICT (form_id) DO UPDATE SET
  form_name = EXCLUDED.form_name,
  fetched_at = now();

parameters.jsCode:
const count = $('Pack Form Rows JSON').first().json.row_count || 0;
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', forms_synced: count } }];

const users = $json.users || [];
return users.map(u => ({ json: { zendesk_user_id: u.id ?? null, agent_name: u.name ?? null, email: u.email ?? null, default_group_id: u.default_group_id ?? null, active: u.active ?? null } }));

const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { rows_json: JSON.stringify(rows), row_count: rows.length } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO zendesk_users_staging (zendesk_user_id, agent_name, email, default_group_id, active)
SELECT x.zendesk_user_id, x.agent_name, x.email, x.default_group_id, x.active
FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ $json.rows_json }}'::jsonb) AS x(
  zendesk_user_id bigint,
  agent_name text,
  email text,
  default_group_id bigint,
  active boolean
)
ON CONFLICT (zendesk_user_id) DO UPDATE SET
  agent_name = EXCLUDED.agent_name,
  email = EXCLUDED.email,
  default_group_id = EXCLUDED.default_group_id,
  active = EXCLUDED.active,
  fetched_at = now();

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { url: $json.next_page } }];

const data = $getWorkflowStaticData('global');
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', pages_loaded: data.users_pages_loaded || 0, users_synced: data.users_rows_loaded || 0 } }];

parameters.query:
with input_payload as (
  select
   '{{ ($json.ticket_rows_json || "[]").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb as rows_json,
    {{ $json.input_rows || $json.batch_count || 0 }}::integer as batch_count,
    {{ $json.end_of_stream ? 'true' : 'false' }}::boolean as end_of_stream,
    {{ $json.next_page_url ? `'${String($json.next_page_url).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'null' }}::text as next_page_url
),
parsed_rows as (
  select
    (row->>'ticket_id')::bigint as ticket_id,
    (row->>'ticket_created_at')::timestamptz as ticket_created_at,
    (row->>'ticket_updated_at')::timestamptz as ticket_updated_at,
    (row->>'ticket_solved_at')::timestamptz as ticket_solved_at,
    row->>'status' as status,
    row->>'channel' as channel,
    (row->>'form_id')::bigint as form_id,
    row->>'form_name' as form_name,
    (row->>'assignee_id')::bigint as assignee_id,
    (row->>'group_id')::bigint as group_id,
    row->>'csat_score' as csat_score,
    (row->>'first_reply_time_business_minutes')::integer as first_reply_time_business_minutes,
    (row->>'next_reply_time_business_minutes')::integer as next_reply_time_business_minutes,
    (row->>'pausable_update_time_business_minutes')::integer as pausable_update_time_business_minutes,
    (row->>'requester_wait_time_business_minutes')::integer as requester_wait_time_business_minutes,
    (row->>'full_resolution_time_business_minutes')::integer as full_resolution_time_business_minutes,
    (row->>'one_business_day_solve_flag')::boolean as one_business_day_solve_flag,
    (row->>'sla_breached_flag')::boolean as sla_breached_flag,
    (row->>'article_linked_flag')::boolean as article_linked_flag,
    (row->>'missed_call_flag')::boolean as missed_call_flag,
    coalesce((row->>'ticket_count')::integer, 1) as ticket_count
  from input_payload,
  jsonb_array_elements(rows_json) as row
),
upserted as (
  insert into public.support_ticket_metrics_fact (
    ticket_id,
    ticket_created_at,
    ticket_updated_at,
    ticket_solved_at,
    status,
    channel,
    form_id,
    form_name,
    assignee_id,
    group_id,
    csat_score,
    first_reply_time_business_minutes,
    next_reply_time_business_minutes,
    pausable_update_time_business_minutes,
    requester_wait_time_business_minutes,
    full_resolution_time_business_minutes,
    one_business_day_solve_flag,
    sla_breached_flag,
    article_linked_flag,
    missed_call_flag,
    ticket_count,
    synced_at
  )
  select
    ticket_id,
    ticket_created_at,
    ticket_updated_at,
    ticket_solved_at,
    status,
    channel,
    form_id,
    form_name,
    assignee_id,
    group_id,
    csat_score,
    first_reply_time_business_minutes,
    next_reply_time_business_minutes,
    pausable_update_time_business_minutes,
    requester_wait_time_business_minutes,
    full_resolution_time_business_minutes,
    one_business_day_solve_flag,
    sla_breached_flag,
    article_linked_flag,
    missed_call_flag,
    ticket_count,
    now()
  from parsed_rows
  on conflict (ticket_id) do update set
    ticket_created_at = excluded.ticket_created_at,
    ticket_updated_at = excluded.ticket_updated_at,
    ticket_solved_at = excluded.ticket_solved_at,
    status = excluded.status,
    channel = excluded.channel,
    form_id = excluded.form_id,
    form_name = excluded.form_name,
    assignee_id = excluded.assignee_id,
    group_id = excluded.group_id,
    csat_score = excluded.csat_score,
    first_reply_time_business_minutes = excluded.first_reply_time_business_minutes,
    next_reply_time_business_minutes = excluded.next_reply_time_business_minutes,
    pausable_update_time_business_minutes = excluded.pausable_update_time_business_minutes,
    requester_wait_time_business_minutes = excluded.requester_wait_time_business_minutes,
    full_resolution_time_business_minutes = excluded.full_resolution_time_business_minutes,
    one_business_day_solve_flag = excluded.one_business_day_solve_flag,
    sla_breached_flag = excluded.sla_breached_flag,
    article_linked_flag = excluded.article_linked_flag,
    missed_call_flag = excluded.missed_call_flag,
    ticket_count = excluded.ticket_count,
    synced_at = now()
  returning ticket_id
),
progress as (
  insert into public.sync_progress (
    run_id,
    flow_name,
    status,
    current_batch,
    total_batches,
    batch_size,
    updated_rows,
    note,
    updated_at
  )
  values (
    '{{ (($json.run_id || "ticket-sync-run") + "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'ticket_sync',
    'running',
    {{ $json.current_batch || 0 }},
    {{ $json.total_batches || 0 }},
    {{ $json.expected_count || $json.batch_count || 0 }},
    (select count(*) from upserted),
    '{{ ((`Processed ticket sync chunk ${$json.current_batch || 0} of ${$json.total_batches || 0}`) + "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    now()
  )
  on conflict (run_id) do update set
    flow_name = excluded.flow_name,
    status = excluded.status,
    current_batch = excluded.current_batch,
    total_batches = excluded.total_batches,
    batch_size = excluded.batch_size,
    updated_rows = coalesce(public.sync_progress.updated_rows, 0) + excluded.updated_rows,
    note = excluded.note,
    updated_at = now()
  returning id
)
select
  (select count(*) from upserted) as upserted_rows,
  (select count(*) from parsed_rows) as parsed_rows,
  (select batch_count from input_payload) as batch_count,
  (select end_of_stream from input_payload) as end_of_stream,
  (select next_page_url from input_payload) as next_page_url;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { url: $json.next_page_url } }];

parameters.query:
select ticket_id
from public.support_ticket_metrics_fact
where ticket_id is not null
  and ticket_created_at >= '{{ $json.date_from }}'::date
  and ticket_created_at < ('{{ $json.date_to }}'::date + interval '1 day')
order by ticket_id;

with input_payload as (
  select
    '{{ ($json.ticket_rows_json || "[]").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb as rows_json,
    '{{ (($json.run_id || "sla-backfill-run") + "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text as run_id,
    {{ $json.batch_number || 0 }}::integer as batch_number,
    {{ $json.total_batches || 0 }}::integer as total_batches,
    {{ $json.batch_size || 0 }}::integer as batch_size
),
parsed_rows as (
  select
    (row->>'ticket_id')::bigint as ticket_id,
    (row->>'sla_breached_flag')::boolean as sla_breached_flag
  from input_payload,
  jsonb_array_elements(rows_json) as row
),
updated as (
  update public.support_ticket_metrics_fact f
  set
    sla_breached_flag = p.sla_breached_flag,
    synced_at = now()
  from parsed_rows p
  where f.ticket_id = p.ticket_id
  returning f.ticket_id
),
progress as (
  insert into public.sync_progress (
    run_id, flow_name, status, current_batch, total_batches,
    batch_size, updated_rows, note, updated_at
  )
  select
    run_id, 'sla_backfill', 'running',
    batch_number, total_batches, batch_size,
    (select count(*) from updated),
    ('Processed SLA batch ' || batch_number || ' of ' || total_batches),
    now()
  from input_payload
  on conflict (run_id) do update set
    flow_name = excluded.flow_name,
    status = excluded.status,
    current_batch = excluded.current_batch,
    total_batches = excluded.total_batches,
    batch_size = excluded.batch_size,
    updated_rows = coalesce(public.sync_progress.updated_rows, 0) + excluded.updated_rows,
    note = excluded.note,
    updated_at = now()
  returning id
)
select
  (select count(*) from parsed_rows) as parsed_rows,
  (select count(*) from updated) as updated_rows;

nodes.name: HTTP: Fetch Ticket Batch with SLAs

parameters.query:
with incoming as (
  select
    '{{ (($('Webhook - Backfill').first().json.body?.run_id || "") + "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text as run_id,
    {{ $('Code - Batch Ticket IDs').all().length || 0 }}::integer as total_batches
),
mark_complete as (
  update public.sync_progress sp
  set
    status = 'completed',
    current_batch = i.total_batches,
    total_batches = i.total_batches,
    note = 'SLA backfill completed',
    updated_at = now()
  from incoming i
  where sp.run_id = i.run_id
  returning sp.run_id, sp.updated_rows
)
select run_id, updated_rows
from mark_complete;

with final_count as (
  select count(*) as total_rows_in_fact
  from public.support_ticket_metrics_fact
),
mark_complete as (
  insert into public.sync_progress (
    run_id,
    flow_name,
    status,
    current_batch,
    total_batches,
    batch_size,
    updated_rows,
    note,
    updated_at
  )
  values (
    '{{ (($json.run_id || "ticket-sync-run") + "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'ticket_sync',
    'completed',
    {{ $json.total_batches || 0 }},
    {{ $json.total_batches || 0 }},
    0,
    {{ $json.upserted_rows || 0 }},
    'Ticket sync completed',
    now()
  )
  on conflict (run_id) do update set
    flow_name = excluded.flow_name,
    status = excluded.status,
    current_batch = excluded.current_batch,
    total_batches = excluded.total_batches,
    batch_size = excluded.batch_size,
    updated_rows = public.sync_progress.updated_rows,
    note = excluded.note,
    updated_at = now()
  returning id
)
select
  {{ $json.status ? `'${String($json.status).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : `'success'` }}::text as status,
  {{ $json.form_id || 'null' }}::bigint as form_id,
  {{ $json.form_name ? `'${String($json.form_name).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'null' }}::text as form_name,
  {{ $json.date_from ? `'${String($json.date_from).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'null' }}::text as date_from,
  {{ $json.date_to ? `'${String($json.date_to).replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'null' }}::text as date_to,
  {{ $json.total_found || 0 }}::integer as total_found,
  {{ $json.pages_loaded || 0 }}::integer as pages_loaded,
  {{ $json.input_rows || 0 }}::integer as input_rows,
  {{ $json.upserted_rows || 0 }}::integer as upserted_rows,
  (select total_rows_in_fact from final_count) as total_rows_in_fact;

main.node: HTTP: Fetch Ticket Batch with SLAs
